            - article [ref=e360]:
              - generic [ref=e362]:
                - heading [level=2] [ref=e363]: About the job
                - paragraph [ref=e365]:
                  - strong [ref=e367]: "Security Clearance: Secret"
                  - strong [ref=e369]: "Location:"
                  - text: West Bethesda, MD
                  - strong [ref=e371]: "Job Type:"
                  - text: Full-Time
                  - strong [ref=e373]: "Target Salary Range*:"
                  - text: $75,000-105,000
                  - list [ref=e375]:
                    - listitem [ref=e376]: This represents the potential salary range for this position depending on education level, years of experience and/or certifications in addition to other position specific requirements which may impact salary
                  - strong [ref=e378]: Position Overview
                  - text: Amatriot is seeking a motivated Full Stack Software Developer to join a small, high-performing team supporting submarine design initiatives at NSWC Carderock. The team develops and maintains multiple mission-critical products used to design blueprints and conceptual models for submarines, supporting system design from early concept through construction. This is a mostly on-site role. New developers will begin by addressing bug fixes and incremental enhancements, then progressively transition into more complex, high-impact development work as technical familiarity and trust are established within the team.
                  - strong [ref=e380]: Key Responsibilities
                  - list [ref=e382]:
                    - listitem [ref=e383]: Develop, debug, and maintain C++ applications supporting naval and basewide systems
                    - listitem [ref=e384]: Collaborate closely with engineers and developers to implement and refine system-level functionality
                    - listitem [ref=e385]: Diagnose and resolve defects using professional debugging tools
                    - listitem [ref=e386]: Contribute to full-stack features spanning UI, application logic, and data layers
                    - listitem [ref=e387]: Participate in code reviews and adhere to established development standards
                    - listitem [ref=e388]: Gradually assume ownership of larger features and subsystems as experience grows
                  - strong [ref=e390]: Qualifications
                  - list [ref=e392]:
                    - listitem [ref=e393]: 1+ year of professional software development experience
                    - listitem [ref=e394]: Experience with C++ or C++-like object-oriented languages (e.g., Java, C#, D)
                    - listitem [ref=e395]: Strong foundational understanding of object-oriented programming concepts
                    - listitem [ref=e396]: Familiarity with Git-based version control workflows
                    - listitem [ref=e397]: Experience using debugging t
